usage_timeline_summary.conclusion_ko: Claude 사용량이 여러 시간 버킷에 분산됐습니다. peak bucket과 고입력 버킷을 중심으로 조정합니다.

actions_ko: select_tickers 후보/evidence pack 행 수와 반복 calibration 블록을 줄이고 8k+ 입력 프롬프트를 별도 경고 기준으로 관리합니다.
claude_lightweighting.conclusion_ko: 후단 hold/r2 경량화는 대체로 작동하지만 selection/R1 입력 집중이 높아 전단 경량화는 미흡합니다.

recommendations.recommendation: Tighten JSON-only enforcement for affected labels or route non-strict responses through a bounded retry; parser recovery should remain fail-safe.
Add a compact-schema self-check or post-parse warning for duplicate watchlist entries and candidate-action coverage gaps.
Separate timeout-prone labels from normal review flow and keep cache/cooldown guards active for repeated HOLD reviews.

Reduce high-token prompts by trimming repeated calibration blocks and limiting evidence pack rows before model invocation; review labels with 8k+ input tokens even when the session average looks acceptable.
select_tickers 후보/evidence pack 행 수와 반복 calibration 블록을 줄이고 8k+ 입력 프롬프트를 별도 경고 기준으로 관리합니다.
Resolve guardian BLOCK_START causes before treating the session as operationally clean; include any repeated block events observed during the window, not just the final snapshot.
Refresh broker truth and keep new entries fail-closed while snapshot freshness is untrusted; review repeated stale/untrusted snapshots from the full window.
Review manual-action-required local state before the next live start window.
Inspect error samples and confirm they did not affect broker truth, order routing, or Claude fallback behavior.
Separate current-session unresolved ORDER_UNKNOWN from historical event noise in the morning review.
API usage delta is negative for calls, input_tokens, output_tokens; treat the quality report's raw-call scan as the Claude usage source of truth for this review.
